abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Behemoth
abilities.text: This model cannot be placed by other models. When it would be moved by another model, halve the distance it moves.

abilities.name: Impenetrable
abilities.text: This model's Shielded tokens reduce damage by 2, instead of 1.

triggers.name: Peace, by Any Means
triggers.text: Once per activation. When resolving, this attack deals +1 damage and the target gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Piercing
triggers.text: When resolving, this action ignores (warding) abilities.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (c). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Harpoon Gun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Move the target up to 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Pull and Drag
triggers.text: Move the target 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Redirect Power
triggers.text: Remove a Shielded token from this model. Declare this action again.

actions.name: Wrecking Ball
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model declares the Charge action, even if engaged, ignoring terrain, and may move up to an additional +2".

triggers.name: Symbol of the Guild
triggers.text: Allies moved through this way gain a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.
